issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and inaccurate. Missing: (1) filter specification for {Revolutionary Army} type AND exclusion of [Belo Betty], (2) 'reveal' parameter to specify revealing cards, (3) 'count' constraint limiting to up to 1 card, (4) 'remainingDestination' to place rest at bottom of deck in any order
Filter set to 'Any' but should specify type={Revolutionary Army} with exclusion of card name [Belo Betty]
